BearerAuth.description: A Buzz session or deployment token. Most operations require a session. Deployment tokens are accepted only for deployment to their assigned site.

info.description: HTTP API for deploying and managing sites on a self-hosted Buzz server. API operations are available only on the configured Buzz domain.
info.title: Buzz

400.description: The device flow failed or expired.

403.description: The GitHub account is not allowed on this server.

post.description: Upload a ZIP archive to create or replace a site. A deployment token may deploy only to its assigned site and must send that name in X-Subdomain.

parameters.description: Site name to create or replace. Buzz generates a name when omitted.
parameters.name: x-subdomain

schema.description: Site name to create or replace. Buzz generates a name when omitted.
schema.title: X-Subdomain

file.description: A ZIP archive containing the site's files.

400.description: The site name or archive is invalid.

403.description: The credential cannot deploy this site.
A session token and site ownership are required.

409.description: Every custom domain must complete removal before deleting the site.

post.description: The token value is returned once and cannot be retrieved later.

403.description: A session token and site ownership are required.

404.description: The deployment token does not exist.
